response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the song '劣等上等' provided in the reference JSON, starting from the second verse. 2. JSON Usage: Reference lyrics were used for the song segment. Manual transcription and translation were performed for the English talk segment and visual elements. Note: The performers in this video are Shirogane Noel and Gigi Murin (contrary to the reference JSON's mention of Usada Pekora). 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied tight timing for vocal bursts and rapid-fire speech. Included subtitles for prominent visual text such as the song title, the 'CANCELLED' stamp, and final title cards.

subtitles.original: 伸びた背丈 育った街に投げキス
subtitles.english: Growing tall - a goodbye-kiss to my hometown

subtitles.original: 見せ場はこっから 覚悟しとけよ
subtitles.english: Highlight reel's rolling now, get ready!

subtitles.original: ダッダッダ 僕ら大人になる
subtitles.english: Dan-dan-dan, We're going to be grownups!

subtitles.original: カウンター狙い 最低な日々に
subtitles.english: Aiming for the chance to counter those shitty days

subtitles.original: 誰も読めない先 まだあいこでしょ
subtitles.english: No one can read the future, we're still tied even here

subtitles.original: バグも、ロスも、ズレも、すべて
subtitles.english: The bugs, the losses, the fuck-ups, all of it.

subtitles.original: 素手で、生きて！生き抜いて覆すよ
subtitles.english: With my bare hands, I'll live, live through it and overthrow it

subtitles.original: くだらないことばっかが譲れない
subtitles.english: It's always the small stuff I can't let go of

subtitles.original: わかるか？あたしの美学
この馬鹿正直な拳ひとつが切り札
subtitles.english: This thick-headed fist alone is my ace up the sleeve

subtitles.original: がなる劣等 一抜けよさらば！
ダッダッダ あたし大人になる
subtitles.english: Dun-dun-dun, I'm going to be a grown-up!

subtitles.original: 酸いも甘いも噛み分けて今
subtitles.english: Knowing the bitter, the sweet, and now

subtitles.original: もう子供じゃないのわかるでしょ
subtitles.english: You know I'm not a child anymore

subtitles.original: 時代 機会 待ってくれない
subtitles.english: Times and opportunities won't wait for us
With my bare hands, at the risk of my life,
I'll survive, and that's just fine.

subtitles.original: それでは皆様お先に Bye, Guys!
subtitles.english: Well then, everyone, I'll be going first. Bye, Guys!

subtitles.original: Write it down! Write it down right now!
subtitles.english: Write it down! Write it down right now!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, they're gonna love this!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, they're gonna love this!

subtitles.original: I'm going to give up on my dreams.
subtitles.english: I'm going to give up on my dreams.

subtitles.original: D- Never give up on your dreams.
subtitles.english: D- Never give up on your dreams.

subtitles.original: Yeah, I feel like you had half a good idea.
subtitles.english: Yeah, I feel like you had half a good idea.

subtitles.original: And you had half a good idea too.
subtitles.english: And you had half a good idea too.

subtitles.original: We'll get the funding one day.
subtitles.english: We'll get the funding one day.

subtitles.original: Well thank you very much everyone...
subtitles.english: Well thank you very much everyone...

subtitles.original: ...that helped us work on all these shows together.
subtitles.english: ...that helped us work on all these shows together.

subtitles.original: And thank you to you grems and otomos at home...
subtitles.english: And thank you to you grems and otomos at home...

subtitles.original: ...watching us today during our TV show.
subtitles.english: ...watching us today during our TV show.

subtitles.original: ...and don't forget there is something else...
subtitles.english: ...and don't forget there is something else...

subtitles.original: ...coming up in just a few minutes!
subtitles.english: ...coming up in just a few minutes!

subtitles.original: Don't change the channel just yet!
subtitles.english: Don't change the channel just yet!

subtitles.original: Yes! Gun to your head, put it down right now!
subtitles.english: Yes! Gun to your head, put it down right now!

subtitles.original: Put down the remote right now!
subtitles.english: Put down the remote right now!
